description: You are a gallery technician at a contemporary art museum preparing video artworks for the opening night of a new exhibition. Transcode the four source video files in /home/ga/Videos/source_artworks/ (artwork_alpha.mp4, artwork_beta.mp4, artwork_gamma.mp4, artwork_delta.mp4) to meet the target room specifications detailed in /home/ga/Documents/room_specs.txt. All outputs must use the H.264 video codec in an MP4 container and be saved to /home/ga/Videos/gallery_ready/ using the required filenames. Ensure Room C uses portrait orientation (width < height) and audio is completely stripped from Rooms B and D. Create an M3U playlist at /home/ga/Videos/gallery_ready/installation_test.m3u listing the four output files in room order (A, B, C, D). Additionally, generate a JSON installation manifest at /home/ga/Documents/installation_manifest.json documenting each room's output filename, resolution, audio status (enabled/disabled), and orientation (landscape/portrait).
